2603.22528.title: GraphRAG for Engineering Diagrams: ChatP&ID Enables LLM Interaction with P&IDs
2603.22528.paper_summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) combined with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and knowledge graphs offer new opportunities for interacting with engineering diagrams such as Piping and Instrumentation Diagrams (P&IDs). However, directly processing raw images or smart P&ID files with LLMs is often costly, inefficient, and prone to hallucinations. This work introduces ChatP&ID, an agentic framework that enables grounded and cost-effective natural-language interaction with P&IDs using Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation (GraphRAG), a paradigm we refer to as GraphRAG for engineering diagrams. Smart P&IDs encoded in the DEXPI standard are transformed into structured knowledge graphs, which serve as the basis for graph-based retrieval and reasoning by LLM agents. This approach enables reliable querying of engineering diagrams while significantly reducing computational cost. Benchmarking across commercial LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic) demonstrates that graph-based representations improve accuracy by 18% over raw image inputs and reduce token costs by 85% compared to directly ingesting smart P&ID files. While small open-source models still struggle to interpret knowledge graph formats and structured engineering data, integrating them with VectorRAG and PathRAG improves response accuracy by up to 40%. Notably, GPT-5-mini combined with ContextRAG achieves 91% accuracy at a cost of only $0.004 per task. The resulting ChatP&ID interface enables intuitive natural-language interaction with complex engineering diagrams and lays the groundwork for AI-assisted process engineering tasks such as Hazard and Operability Studies (HAZOP) and multi-agent analysis.
2603.22528.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）結合檢索增強生成（RAG）和知識圖譜為與工程圖表（如管道和儀表圖（P&IDs））的互動提供了新的機會。<lb/>然而，直接使用LLMs處理原始圖像或智能P&ID文件通常成本高昂、效率低下，且容易產生幻覺。<lb/>本研究介紹了ChatP&ID，一個機器人框架，通過使用圖形檢索增強生成（Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation，簡稱GraphRAG）實現與P&IDs的基於現實的、成本效益高的自然語言互動，這一範式我們稱之為工程圖表的GraphRAG。<lb/>按照DEXPI標準編碼的智能P&ID被轉換為結構化知識圖譜，這些圖譜作為LLM代理的基於圖形的檢索和推理的基礎。<lb/>這種方法使得對工程圖表的可靠查詢成為可能，同時顯著降低計算成本。<lb/>在商業LLM API（OpenAI、Anthropic）上的基準測試顯示，基於圖形的表示相比於原始圖像輸入提高了18%的準確性，並且與直接攝取智能P&ID文件相比，令牌成本降低了85%。<lb/>雖然小型開源模型仍然難以解釋知識圖譜格式和結構化工程數據，但將其與VectorRAG和PathRAG整合可將響應準確性提高多達40%。<lb/>值得注意的是，結合ContextRAG的GPT-5-mini以僅$0.004的成本實現了91%的準確性。<lb/>最終生成的ChatP&ID界面實現了與複雜工程圖表的直觀自然語言互動，並為AI輔助的過程工程任務（如危害與可操作性研究（HAZOP）和多代理分析）奠定了基礎。
2603.22528.author: Achmad Anggawirya Alimin et.al.
2603.22528.authors: Achmad Anggawirya Alimin, Artur M. Schweidtmann
